📄 原文内容:



◎译　　名　在你被判死刑之前 君が死刑になる前に
◎年　　代　2026
◎产　　地　日本
◎类　　别　剧情 / 悬疑 / 奇幻
◎语　　言　日语
◎上映日期　2026-04-02(日本)
◎IMDb链接　
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/38363701/
◎导　　演　川井隼人 Hayato Kawai (id:36214361)
　　　　　 宗野賢一 Kenichi Sono (id:37020426)
◎编　　剧　森迅史 Hayashi Mori (id:27586063)
◎演　　员　加藤清史郎 Seishirô Katô (id:27491911)
　　　　　 唐田英里佳 Erika Karata (id:27573148)
　　　　　 铃木仁 Suzuki Jin (id:30241547)
　　　　　 与田祐希 Yuuki Yoda (id:27496354)
　　　　　 内博贵 Hiroki Uchi (id:27495914)
　　　　　 内田慈 Chika Uchida (id:27550713)
　　　　　 伊礼姬奈 Himena Irei (id:35702102)

◎简　　介
　　震惊社会的“教师连环杀害案”主犯大隈汐梨被执行死刑之际，琥太郎却与两名好友意外穿越回七年前——正值案件接连发生之时。原本不可能相遇的他们，在过去与仍为通缉犯的汐梨相遇，而她坚称自己并未杀人。面对她的辩解与反复出现的可疑举动，琥太郎等人陷入动摇；与此同时，连环杀人仍在持续。真正的凶手究竟是谁？故事在“过去”与“现在”两条时间线交错推进，揭开隐藏在案件背后的真相，一场原创本格悬疑由此展开。




引用
★★★★★ General Information ★★★★★

◎简　　介
　　Season five of “For All Mankind” picks up in the years since the Goldilocks asteroid heist. Happy Valley has grown into a thriving colony with thousands of residents and a base for new missions that will take us even further into the solar system. But with the nations of Earth now demanding law and order on the Red Planet, friction continues to build between the people who live... (展开全部) 　　Season five of “For All Mankind” picks up in the years since the Goldilocks asteroid heist. Happy Valley has grown into a thriving colony with thousands of residents and a base for new missions that will take us even further into the solar system. But with the nations of Earth now demanding law and order on the Red Planet, friction continues to build between the people who live on Mars and their former home.
